evals.prompt: scrape linkedin leads for SaaS founders and COOs, limit to 30
evals.expected_output: Claude runs scrape_leads.py with --titles and --limit args, shows the command, explains what it does and what to do next

evals.prompt: generate connection messages for my linkedin leads using chatgpt
evals.expected_output: Claude runs generate_messages.py, recommends --dry-run first, shows the command, explains the 300-char limit and that messages are saved to Google Sheets

evals.prompt: run the full linkedin pipeline — scrape 50 agency owners and write personalized connection notes
evals.expected_output: Claude runs scrape_leads.py then generate_messages.py in sequence, uses correct args, shows both commands clearly

evals.prompt: set up my linkedin outreach sheet for the first time
evals.expected_output: Claude runs setup.py, shows the command, explains the sheet structure and required env vars
